intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC机制深化与AI专利审查转型
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Matures, AI Reshapes Patent Examination
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲IP生态呈现“司法高效化”与“审查智能化”双轨并进态势。统一专利法院（UPC）通过发布年报、上线PMAC调解系统及整合判例，显著降低维权成本并提升确定性。与此同时，EPO加速推进2027年全面无纸化及AI辅助审查，强调人机协同。司法层面，CJEU在版权传播边界及商标声誉评估上确立新标准。整体而言，欧洲正从单纯的权利授予向高价值IP资产运营与快速争议解决转型，对企业的合规响应速度提出更高要求。
top_signals: UPC PMAC调解系统上线，替代性争议解决机制正式融入欧洲专利维权主流路径
EPO明确2027年指南修订方向，拟强制要求指明修改依据并引用UPC判例
CJEU裁定养老院内部转播不构成向公众传播，限缩版权集体管理组织授权范围
DeepIP收购PatentMaker，AI工具深度嵌入德国头部律所专利申请工作流
cross_currents: 司法与行政协同增强：EPO指南开始吸纳UPC上诉法院判例，意味着审查标准将更紧密跟随司法实践，减少行政与司法认定的割裂
维权成本结构重构：UPC提供的高效诉讼与PMAC提供的低成本调解形成互补，迫使企业在欧维权策略从“单一诉讼”转向“分层争议解决”，尤其利好SEP纠纷的快速化解
知识产权金融化起步：EUIPO与EIF合作解锁IP融资，结合英国KAM枢纽推出，显示欧洲正试图将IP从法律权利转化为可量化、可抵押的商业资产，以支持创新型企业流动性
implications: 在欧专利布局需前置应对AI审查：鉴于EPO拟强制要求指明修改依据且引入AI预检索，中国企业需在申请阶段提供更详尽的技术对比说明，避免因形式瑕疵被驳回
利用UPC新机制优化维权预算：面对SEP或复杂专利纠纷，应优先评估PMAC调解可能性，利用其在线管理系统降低跨境诉讼的时间与金钱成本，避免陷入长期拉锯战
关注版权合规的场景化差异：针对涉及内容分发或智能硬件的企业，需依据CJEU最新判决重新评估封闭场景（如内部网络、特定设施）下的版权许可义务，避免过度支付授权费
watchlist: 2027年EPO指南中关于“修改依据”强制义务的具体执行细则及过渡期安排
PMAC调解服务启动后的首批案例成功率及仲裁规则在SEP FRAND费率确定中的实际应用
成员国如何将CJEU关于新闻出版者公平报酬的判决转化为国内法，影响平台内容合规成本

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC米兰分院确立审查历史低权重与举证新规
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Milan Limits Prosecution History Weight and Shifts Evidentiary Burdens
daily_report.executive_line: UPC米兰分院两裁决重塑专利诉讼规则：审查历史解释权重降低，特定情形下举证责任转移。EUIPO发布外观改革指南，UKIPO上线资产管理枢纽，欧洲IP基础设施...
daily_report.summary_zh: 本窗口核心在于UPC米兰分院的程序性突破：裁定EPO审查历史在权利要求解释中仅具低权重，并确认在信息不对称时可转移举证责任，显著影响侵权抗辩策略。同时，EUIPO发布外观设计改革第二阶段指南，为7月生效做准备；UKIPO推出知识资产管理枢纽强化商业化支持。DeepIP收购PatentMaker切入德国市场，显示AI工具在欧洲的整合加速。

report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published the Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub, a centralized resource collection designed to assist research institutions and businesses. This guidance aims to support organizations in identifying, protecting, managing, and utilizing their intellectual property alongside wider knowledge assets. The hub serves as a practical tool for rights holders seeking structured approaches to asset oversight. It provides foundational information for entities looking to enhance their internal capabilities regarding IP recognition and stewardship. The publication...

资源目标涵盖知识产权的识别、保护、管理及使用全流程
core_points_en: UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.
Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets.
report_items.insight_zh: 此为政策性指导资源发布，非法律变更或判例。实务中可关注该枢纽提供的具体工具与框架，以优化内部IP管理流程，但需结合具体业务场景评估适用性。
report_items.insight_en: This publication offers a non-binding administrative resource rather than new legal precedent. For in-house counsel and IP teams, the hub may serve as a reference for structuring internal audits of intangible assets. It highlights the UKIPO's focus on broader knowledge asset management beyond traditional IP rights. Practitioners should review the specific tools provided to determine if they align with existing corpor...
insight_points_zh: 关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架

insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.
Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.
What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation.

report_items.title: Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son exploitation non autorisée
report_items.summary_zh: 巴黎司法法院于2025年4月2日作出终审判决（案号RG n°21/13260），裁定HYDRAFACIAL商标未发生退化，确认其本身具有显著性，并制裁了未经授权的使用行为。该判决解决了商标持有人与另一方之间的争议，明确了该品牌在法国的法律保护状态。
report_items.summary_en: The Paris Judicial Court issued a final judgment on April 2, 2025 (RG n°21/13260), resolving a dispute concerning the validity and protection of the HYDRAFACIAL trademarks. The court rejected claims that the mark had become generic, affirming its inherent distinctiveness. Consequently, the tribunal sanctioned the unauthorized exploitation of the brand by the opposing party. This decision confirms the legal standing of the HYDRAFACIAL marks in France, upholding the rights holder’s ability to enforce against third-party use. The ruling underscores the court’s assessment that the mark retains its...
core_points_zh: 巴黎司法法院驳回HYDRAFACIAL商标退化的主张，维持其有效性
法院确认该商标本身具有显著性，受法律保护
法院对未经授权使用该商标的行为进行了制裁
core_points_en: Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.
Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.
Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment illustrates the French judiciary’s rigorous approach to trademark degeneracy, requiring substantial proof of genericide before stripping protection. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of consistent enforcement to maintain distinctiveness. Practitioners should note the court’s willingness to uphold well-known marks against dilution arguments when active policing is demonstrated. Monitoring...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.
What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes.

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements agains...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

report_items.title_zh: UPC判例：专利审查历史在权利要求解释中权重较低
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division Assigns Low Weight to Prosecution History in Claim Interpretation
report_items.title: Prosecution History Carries Little Weight at the UPC | EIP | EIP
report_items.summary_zh: UPC米兰地方法院在Agathon诉Intercom案中指出，欧洲专利局审查过程中的陈述对权利要求解释无约束力，仅具低证据权重。法院主要依据专利说明书进行解释，审查历史仅作为本领域技术人员观点的辅助参考。最终认定专利经修改后有效，但被告产品未侵权。
report_items.summary_en: In Agathon v Intercom, the UPC Milan Local Division held that prosecution history is not binding for claim interpretation but may offer limited guidance. The court examined statements made during EPO proceedings regarding the term 'abuts' in a mechanical patent. While acknowledging these statements could reflect the skilled person’s view, the division primarily relied on the patent description to adopt a narrower construction. The prosecution arguments served only to confirm the interpretation derived from the specification. This decision aligns with Court of Appeal precedents indicating that...
core_points_zh: UPC米兰分院裁定EPO审查历史对权利要求解释无约束力，仅提供低权重指引
法院主要基于专利说明书解释权利要求，审查历史仅用于佐证本领域技术人员观点
涉案专利经辅助请求修改后维持有效，但法院认定被告产品未落入保护范围
core_points_en: Prosecution history is not binding at the UPC but may provide low-weight guidance on claim interpretation.
The Milan Local Division prioritized the patent description over EPO prosecution statements when construing disputed claim terms.
Applicant assertions during grant proceedings serve as auxiliary evidence reflecting the skilled person’s perspective at filing.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案确认了UPC在权利要求解释中对审查历史持谨慎态度，其仅作为反映本领域技术人员认知的辅助证据，而非决定性依据。实务中应重点关注说明书及权利要求本身的清晰性，不宜过度依赖审查档案来主张或抗辩侵权范围，需持续观察上诉法院对此类证据权重的进一步界定。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment reinforces that UPC panels will prioritize the patent specification and claims over prosecution history. Rights holders should ensure claim language is clear within the granted text, as prior arguments before the EPO carry minimal evidential weight. Litigants cannot rely heavily on file estoppel concepts familiar in other jurisdictions to restrict or expand scope.
insight_points_zh: 审查历史在UPC诉讼中仅具辅助参考价值，非决定性解释依据
权利要求解释仍应以说明书和本领域技术人员视角为核心基础
需关注后续上诉案件是否会对审查历史的证据权重确立更明确标准
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Prosecution history offers limited strategic value in UPC infringement or validity disputes compared to the patent specification itself.
Practice note: Draft clear claims and descriptions during prosecution, as post-grant reliance on examination statements for interpretation is risky.
What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions clarifying the precise evidential threshold for admitting prosecution history in claim construction.

report_items.title_zh: 通过塞浦路斯知识产权盒制度最大化软件与创新价值
report_items.title_en: Cyprus IP Box Regime: Tax Efficiency for Software and Innovation Assets
report_items.title: Maximising Software And Innovation Value Through The Cyprus IP Box Regime
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析塞浦路斯符合经合组织标准的知识产权盒制度。该制度允许对合格知识产权收入享受80%扣除，有效税率约3%。采用“修正关联法”，要求税收优惠与实际研发支出挂钩。受版权保护的软件明确纳入合格资产，但商标等品牌资产 excluded。合格收入涵盖许可费、嵌入产品的收入及处置收益。
report_items.summary_en: Cyprus offers an OECD-compliant Intellectual Property Box regime designed to incentivize research and development. The framework provides an eighty percent deduction on qualifying IP profits, resulting in an effective corporate tax rate of approximately three percent. This benefit applies to income derived from copyrighted software, algorithms, and platforms, provided the taxpayer demonstrates a direct link between the income and actual R&D expenditures. The regime utilizes a modified nexus approach to ensure compliance with international standards, requiring that tax relief remains proportion...
core_points_zh: 塞浦路斯知识产权盒提供80%利润扣除，结合15%企业税率，使合格IP收入有效税率降至约…
制度核心为修正关联法，确保税收减免比例与企业实际发生的合格研发支出相匹配，符合经合组织…
受版权保护的软件、算法及平台属于合格知识产权，但商标和徽标等品牌相关资产不符合该制度资格
core_points_en: Qualifying IP income benefits from an eighty percent deduction, yielding an effective tax rate near three percent.
The modified nexus approach links tax relief directly to substantiated research and development expenditures incurred by the entity.
Copyrighted software and digital assets qualify for the regime, whereas brand-related assets such as trademarks are excluded.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，塞浦路斯后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This regime is relevant for technology companies structuring IP ownership within the EU. It emphasizes substance over form, requiring robust documentation of R&D spend to justify tax benefits. Rights holders should assess whether their software development activities meet the modified nexus criteria to optimize fiscal efficiency while maintaining OECD compliance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Tech firms holding copyrighted software can significantly reduce tax liability on IP-derived income through structured R&D investment.
Practice note: Accurate allocation and documentation of qualifying R&D expenditures are essential to satisfy the modified nexus approach requirements.
What to monitor: Watch for evolving administrative guidance on eligible R&D costs and potential updates to OECD nexus standards affecting eligibility.

report_items.title_zh: EPO决定T 0655/24：平衡抗体权利要求的结构与功能特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0655/24: Balancing Structure and Function in Antibody Claims
report_items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: Striking the Right Balance in Antibody Claim Drafting
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析EPO决定T 0655/24，探讨如何在抗体权利要求中平衡结构与功能特征以确立创造性。针对仅由部分结构特征定义的权利要求易受质疑的问题，该决定展示了一种替代方案：结合有限的结构定义（如特定Fc突变）与反映技术效果的功能限制，既确保技术效果在权利要求范围内可信，又避免保护范围过窄。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis of EPO decision T 0655/24 addresses the challenge of drafting antibody claims that satisfy inventive step requirements without becoming unduly narrow. The European Patent Office requires technical effects to be credible across the entire claim scope. While defining antibodies by full variable domain sequences ensures credibility, it often restricts protection. T 0655/24 illustrates an alternative approach combining limited structural definitions, such as specific Fc mutations, with functional limitations. This method maintains claim breadth while ensuring the asserted technical e...
core_points_zh: EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性
T 0655/24展示了结合特定Fc突变结构定义与功能性限制的权利要求撰写方法
该方法要求Fc区不结合Fcγ受体，且血浆清除率偏差控制在特定比例内
core_points_en: Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO.
T 0655/24 combines specific Fc mutation structures with functional limits to balance breadth and credibility.
Functional parameters included non-binding of Fc gamma receptors and controlled plasma clearance rate deviations.
report_items.insight_zh: 该决定为抗体专利撰写提供了重要参考，表明在结构性限定可能导致保护范围过窄时，可通过引入精确的功能性限制来维持创造性的可信度。申请人需关注EPO对“全范围可信度”的严格审查标准，并在说明书中充分支持功能特征与结构特征的关联，以优化权利要求布局。
report_items.insight_en: For practitioners managing European antibody portfolios, T 0655/24 highlights a viable drafting strategy when full structural definition yields excessively narrow claims. By anchoring claims in specific structural mutations paired with precise functional parameters, applicants can demonstrate cross-scope credibility. This approach mitigates the risk of post-filing evidence rejection while preserving commercially rele...
insight_points_zh: EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格
结合具体结构突变与功能性参数限制是应对创造性质疑的有效策略
需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在后续类似案件中对功能特征接受度的变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Practice note: Draft claims combining specific structural mutations with quantifiable functional limits to satisfy EPO plausibility standards.
What to monitor: Future Board of Appeal decisions testing the acceptance of similar hybrid structural-functional claiming strategies.

report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published the Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub, a centralized resource collection designed to assist research institutions and businesses. This guidance aims to support organizations in identifying, protecting, managing, and utilizing their intellectual property alongside wider knowledge assets. The hub serves as a practical tool for rights holders seeking structured approaches to asset oversight. It provides foundational information for entities looking to enhance their internal capabilities regarding IP recognition and stewardship. The publication...
core_points_zh: UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集
资源目标涵盖知识产权的识别、保护、管理及使用全流程
core_points_en: UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.
Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets.
report_items.insight_zh: 此为政策性指导资源发布，非法律变更或判例。实务中可关注该枢纽提供的具体工具与框架，以优化内部IP管理流程，但需结合具体业务场景评估适用性。
report_items.insight_en: This publication offers a non-binding administrative resource rather than new legal precedent. For in-house counsel and IP teams, the hub may serve as a reference for structuring internal audits of intangible assets. It highlights the UKIPO's focus on broader knowledge asset management beyond traditional IP rights. Practitioners should review the specific tools provided to determine if they align with existing corpor...
insight_points_zh: 关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架

insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.
Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.
What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation.

report_items.title_en: Paris Court Rejects Degeneracy of HYDRAFACIAL Mark, Affirms Distinctiveness and Sanctions Unauthorized Use
report_items.title: Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son exploitation non autorisée
report_items.summary_zh: 巴黎司法法院于2025年4月2日作出终审判决（案号RG n°21/13260），裁定HYDRAFACIAL商标未发生退化，确认其本身具有显著性，并制裁了未经授权的使用行为。该判决解决了商标持有人与另一方之间的争议，明确了该品牌在法国的法律保护状态。
report_items.summary_en: The Paris Judicial Court issued a final judgment on April 2, 2025 (RG n°21/13260), resolving a dispute concerning the validity and protection of the HYDRAFACIAL trademarks. The court rejected claims that the mark had become generic, affirming its inherent distinctiveness. Consequently, the tribunal sanctioned the unauthorized exploitation of the brand by the opposing party. This decision confirms the legal standing of the HYDRAFACIAL marks in France, upholding the rights holder’s ability to enforce against third-party use. The ruling underscores the court’s assessment that the mark retains its...
core_points_zh: 巴黎司法法院驳回HYDRAFACIAL商标退化的主张，维持其有效性
法院确认该商标本身具有显著性，受法律保护
法院对未经授权使用该商标的行为进行了制裁
core_points_en: Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.
Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.
Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment illustrates the French judiciary’s rigorous approach to trademark degeneracy, requiring substantial proof of genericide before stripping protection. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of consistent enforcement to maintain distinctiveness. Practitioners should note the court’s willingness to uphold well-known marks against dilution arguments when active policing is demonstrated. Monitoring...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.
What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes.

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements agains...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

report_items.title_zh: UPC判例：专利审查历史在权利要求解释中权重较低
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division Assigns Low Weight to Prosecution History in Claim Interpretation
report_items.title: Prosecution History Carries Little Weight at the UPC | EIP | EIP
report_items.summary_zh: UPC米兰地方法院在Agathon诉Intercom案中指出，欧洲专利局审查过程中的陈述对权利要求解释无约束力，仅具低证据权重。法院主要依据专利说明书进行解释，审查历史仅作为本领域技术人员观点的辅助参考。最终认定专利经修改后有效，但被告产品未侵权。
report_items.summary_en: In Agathon v Intercom, the UPC Milan Local Division held that prosecution history is not binding for claim interpretation but may offer limited guidance. The court examined statements made during EPO proceedings regarding the term 'abuts' in a mechanical patent. While acknowledging these statements could reflect the skilled person’s view, the division primarily relied on the patent description to adopt a narrower construction. The prosecution arguments served only to confirm the interpretation derived from the specification. This decision aligns with Court of Appeal precedents indicating that...
core_points_zh: UPC米兰分院裁定EPO审查历史对权利要求解释无约束力，仅提供低权重指引
法院主要基于专利说明书解释权利要求，审查历史仅用于佐证本领域技术人员观点
涉案专利经辅助请求修改后维持有效，但法院认定被告产品未落入保护范围
core_points_en: Prosecution history is not binding at the UPC but may provide low-weight guidance on claim interpretation.
The Milan Local Division prioritized the patent description over EPO prosecution statements when construing disputed claim terms.
Applicant assertions during grant proceedings serve as auxiliary evidence reflecting the skilled person’s perspective at filing.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案确认了UPC在权利要求解释中对审查历史持谨慎态度，其仅作为反映本领域技术人员认知的辅助证据，而非决定性依据。实务中应重点关注说明书及权利要求本身的清晰性，不宜过度依赖审查档案来主张或抗辩侵权范围，需持续观察上诉法院对此类证据权重的进一步界定。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment reinforces that UPC panels will prioritize the patent specification and claims over prosecution history. Rights holders should ensure claim language is clear within the granted text, as prior arguments before the EPO carry minimal evidential weight. Litigants cannot rely heavily on file estoppel concepts familiar in other jurisdictions to restrict or expand scope.
insight_points_zh: 审查历史在UPC诉讼中仅具辅助参考价值，非决定性解释依据
权利要求解释仍应以说明书和本领域技术人员视角为核心基础
需关注后续上诉案件是否会对审查历史的证据权重确立更明确标准
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Prosecution history offers limited strategic value in UPC infringement or validity disputes compared to the patent specification itself.
Practice note: Draft clear claims and descriptions during prosecution, as post-grant reliance on examination statements for interpretation is risky.
What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions clarifying the precise evidential threshold for admitting prosecution history in claim construction.

These changes are scheduled to enter into force on 1 July 2026. The newly released guidance aims to provide clarity for registered design applicants and legal practitioners ahead of the imminent regulatory updates. This announcement serves as a preparatory resource for stakeholders managing EU design portfolios, offering early insight into procedural adjustments. By issuing this information well in advance of the effective date, the EU...

该改革计划的第二阶段定于2026年7月1日正式生效
新指南旨在为注册外观设计申请人及从业者提供前期指导
core_points_en: EUIPO published further implementation details for Phase 2 of the EU design reform programme.
The revised design regulations and associated procedures are scheduled to take effect on 1 July 2026.
New guidance provides preparatory clarity for registered design applicants and practitioners before changes occur.

For in-house counsel and external practitioners, reviewing this guidance is essential to align internal processes with upcoming requirements. While specific procedural mechanics may evolve, current materials allow for preliminary assessment of portfolio management impacts. Stakeholders should integrate these timelines i...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders gain early notice of regulatory changes affecting EU design registration and maintenance from July 2026.
Practice note: Practitioners should review the guidance to identify procedural adjustments needed for future filings and portfolio administration.
What to monitor: Track subsequent EUIPO communications for detailed operational instructions and transitional measures leading up to the effective date.

report_items.title_zh: 通过塞浦路斯知识产权盒制度最大化软件与创新价值
report_items.title_en: Cyprus IP Box Regime: Tax Efficiency for Software and Innovation Assets
report_items.title: Maximising Software And Innovation Value Through The Cyprus IP Box Regime
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析塞浦路斯符合经合组织标准的知识产权盒制度。该制度允许对合格知识产权收入享受80%扣除，有效税率约3%。采用“修正关联法”，要求税收优惠与实际研发支出挂钩。受版权保护的软件明确纳入合格资产，但商标等品牌资产 excluded。合格收入涵盖许可费、嵌入产品的收入及处置收益。
report_items.summary_en: Cyprus offers an OECD-compliant Intellectual Property Box regime designed to incentivize research and development. The framework provides an eighty percent deduction on qualifying IP profits, resulting in an effective corporate tax rate of approximately three percent. This benefit applies to income derived from copyrighted software, algorithms, and platforms, provided the taxpayer demonstrates a direct link between the income and actual R&D expenditures. The regime utilizes a modified nexus approach to ensure compliance with international standards, requiring that tax relief remains proportion...

report_items.title_zh: EPO决定T 0655/24：平衡抗体权利要求的结构与功能特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0655/24: Balancing Structure and Function in Antibody Claims
report_items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: Striking the Right Balance in Antibody Claim Drafting
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析EPO决定T 0655/24，探讨如何在抗体权利要求中平衡结构与功能特征以确立创造性。针对仅由部分结构特征定义的权利要求易受质疑的问题，该决定展示了一种替代方案：结合有限的结构定义（如特定Fc突变）与反映技术效果的功能限制，既确保技术效果在权利要求范围内可信，又避免保护范围过窄。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis of EPO decision T 0655/24 addresses the challenge of drafting antibody claims that satisfy inventive step requirements without becoming unduly narrow. The European Patent Office requires technical effects to be credible across the entire claim scope. While defining antibodies by full variable domain sequences ensures credibility, it often restricts protection. T 0655/24 illustrates an alternative approach combining limited structural definitions, such as specific Fc mutations, with functional limitations. This method maintains claim breadth while ensuring the asserted technical e...
core_points_zh: EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性
T 0655/24展示了结合特定Fc突变结构定义与功能性限制的权利要求撰写方法
该方法要求Fc区不结合Fcγ受体，且血浆清除率偏差控制在特定比例内
core_points_en: Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO.
T 0655/24 combines specific Fc mutation structures with functional limits to balance breadth and credibility.
Functional parameters included non-binding of Fc gamma receptors and controlled plasma clearance rate deviations.
report_items.insight_zh: 该决定为抗体专利撰写提供了重要参考，表明在结构性限定可能导致保护范围过窄时，可通过引入精确的功能性限制来维持创造性的可信度。申请人需关注EPO对“全范围可信度”的严格审查标准，并在说明书中充分支持功能特征与结构特征的关联，以优化权利要求布局。
report_items.insight_en: For practitioners managing European antibody portfolios, T 0655/24 highlights a viable drafting strategy when full structural definition yields excessively narrow claims. By anchoring claims in specific structural mutations paired with precise functional parameters, applicants can demonstrate cross-scope credibility. This approach mitigates the risk of post-filing evidence rejection while preserving commercially rele...
insight_points_zh: EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格
结合具体结构突变与功能性参数限制是应对创造性质疑的有效策略
需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在后续类似案件中对功能特征接受度的变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Practice note: Draft claims combining specific structural mutations with quantifiable functional limits to satisfy EPO plausibility standards.
What to monitor: Future Board of Appeal decisions testing the acceptance of similar hybrid structural-functional claiming strategies.

Next, Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive. Why it matters: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Finally, Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical s. Why it matters: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical inform.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on General IP, Trade marks, Patents. The next point to watch is Consistency of UPC case law on evidentiary burden allocation.

topics.headline_zh: UPC机制成熟与中国申请激增
topics.headline_en: UPC Maturity, PMAC Launch, and Rising Chinese Patent Filings
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）运行趋于成熟，PMAC调解中心正式上线，杜塞尔多夫等关键分院扩容。同期，中国首次跻身欧洲专利申请来源国前三，统一专利采纳率显著提升。UPC判例在证据披露、权利要求解释及费用裁定上确立严格标准，中欧企业需适应“诉讼+ADR”双轨机制，优化在欧IP战略布局。
key_points: 制度完善：PMAC调解仲裁中心正式运营，杜塞尔多夫等地方法院增设合议庭，案件管理系统升级，提升纠纷解决效率与透明度。
中国崛起：2025年中国首次进入EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利因成本优势获中小企业青睐， uptake率达28.7%。
司法严规：UPC判例强调审查档案对权利要求的限制作用，严格执行证据前置披露规则，并明确举证责任转移及费用承担标准。
actions: 利用PMAC机制：针对SEP或许可纠纷，优先评估通过PMAC进行调解或仲裁，以降低维权成本并缩短周期。
规范证据管理：建立符合UPC标准的证据前置披露流程，确保实物证据来源链完整，避免因迟交或程序瑕疵被排除。
协同申请策略：结合中国申请量增长趋势，对核心产品采用“统一专利+传统欧洲专利”组合布局，平衡覆盖范围与风险。
watchlist: UPC上诉法院关于管辖权范围提请欧盟法院裁决的后续结果。
2027年EPO指南修订中关于修改依据强制指明义务的具体落地。
主要分院（如慕尼黑、巴黎）在等同侵权判定上的判例趋同化进程。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) demonstrated operational maturity with the formal launch of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) and expanded judicial capacity in key divisions such as Düsseldorf. Concurrently, China ranked among the top three sources of European patent applications for the first time, while Unitary Patent adoption reached 28.7%, driven significantly by small and medium-sized enterprises. Recent UPC case law has established rigorous standards for evidence disclosure, claim interpretation via prosecution history, and cost allocation. These developments require rights holders to adapt to a dual-track enforcement environment combining litigation and alternative dispute resolution. Shifting Filing Dynamics: China entered the top three countries of origin for European patent applications in 2025, coinciding with a 28.7% Unitary Patent uptake rate as cost-effec...
Strict Procedural Standards: UPC jurisprudence increasingly emphasizes the limiting effect of prosecution history on claim scope, enforces strict pre-trial evidence disclosure prot...
actions_en: Leverage ADR Mechanisms: For standard-essential patent or licensing disputes, prioritize assessment of PMAC mediation or arbitration options to reduce litigation costs and accelera...
Standardize Evidence Protocols: Implement internal workflows for early evidence disclosure that comply with UPC standards, ensuring complete chain-of-custody documentation to preve...
Optimize Portfolio Strategy: Align filing strategies with rising application volumes by adopting a hybrid approach of Unitary Patents and traditional European validations to balanc...

Implementation details of the mandatory indication of amendment bases in the 2027 revision of the EPO Guidelines.
Convergence of case law on equivalence infringement determinations across major local divisions, including Munich and Paris.

topics.headline_zh: UPC重塑SEP格局：费率裁定与禁令博弈
topics.headline_en: UPC Reshapes SEP Landscape: FRAND Rates, Injunctions, and Jurisdictional Conflicts
topics.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）正深刻改变欧洲SEP生态，曼海姆分院打破传统尝试裁定FRAND费率，并频繁签发针对中国企业的反反诉禁令。中英法院在ZTE诉三星案中作出冲突的全球费率判决，凸显管辖权争夺。PMAC调解中心启用提供新解纷路径，但司法碎片化加剧，许可不确定性显著上升。
key_points: UPC曼海姆分院突破德国传统，主动介入FRAND费率裁定，并广泛运用反反诉禁令限制中国企业在他国寻求临时许可。
中英法院就同一SEP纠纷作出相互冲突的全球费率判决，导致管辖权竞争白热化，增加跨国合规与诉讼风险。
UPC专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）正式运营，为FRAND争议提供替代性解决机制，但司法干预仍主导市场定价逻辑。
actions: 收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿以保留FRAND抗辩权，避免被认定非善意实施者而遭禁令。
审查许可协议中关于退出UPC管辖的决策权归属，提前制定应对反反诉禁令的全球诉讼防御策略。
评估利用PMAC进行调解的可能性，同时密切关注英国最高法院及欧盟层面关于专利池FRAND义务的最新判例。
watchlist: 英国最高法院对专利池是否承担FRAND义务的终审裁决及其对全球许可模式的影响。
UPC上诉法院对长臂管辖权及跨境禁令效力的进一步澄清，特别是涉及非成员国资产的执行问题。
欧盟委员会针对SEP许可透明度及反垄断合规的最新立法动态或指南修订。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) is fundamentally altering the European standard-essential patent (SEP) ecosystem. The Mannheim Local Division has departed from traditional German practice by actively adjudicating FRAND rates and frequently issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions against foreign interim licenses. Concurrently, conflicting global rate judgments in the ZTE v. Samsung dispute between Chinese and UK courts highlight intensifying jurisdictional competition. While the newly operational Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) offers alternative dispute resolution pathways, judicial intervention continues to dominate market pricing logic. This fragmentation increases compliance risks for multinational implementers and rights holders. Stakeholders must navigate complex procedural rules, including strict requirements for demonstrating licensing willingness and evolving confidentia...

Conflicting global FRAND rate judgments between UK and Chinese courts exacerbate jurisdictional competition, significantly increasing cross-border litigation and compliance risks f...
The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) is now operational, providing a confidential alternative for dispute resolution, though court-led adjudication remains the primar...
actions_en: Respond promptly to infringement notices with clear written expressions of licensing willingness to preserve FRAND defenses and avoid being deemed an unwilling licensee subject to...
Review license agreements to clarify authority over UPC opt-out decisions and develop global litigation strategies that account for potential anti-anti-suit injunctions and jurisdi...
Evaluate PMAC mediation as a strategic option while monitoring evolving case law on FRAND obligations, patent pool liabilities, and procedural rules regarding confidential evidence...
watchlist_en: UK Supreme Court rulings on whether patent pools bear direct FRAND obligations and the subsequent impact on global licensing models and liability structures.
UPC Court of Appeal clarifications on the scope of international jurisdiction, particularly regarding the enforceability of cross-border injunctions and assets in non-member states...
Regulatory developments from the UKIPO and EU Commission concerning SEP transparency, essentiality checks, and antitrust compliance guidelines affecting licensing negotiations.

topics.headline_zh: EUIPO执法趋严与权利边界重塑
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Tightens Enforcement Standards and Redefines Trademark Rights Boundaries
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，EUIPO强化跨机构打假协作，上线IPEP数字工具并联合欧盟委员会打击网售假冒。司法层面明确脱欧后英国未注册商标失效，收紧名人姓名及驰名商标保护标准。同时，新设手工艺品地理标志制度进入过渡期，DesignView成为全球最大外观搜索库，企业需适应更严合规与数字化确权环境。
key_points: 执法数字化与协同化：EUIPO推出IPEP门户，联合Eurojust及欧盟委员会开展SHIELD VI等行动，重点打击药品、耗材及在线盗版，跨境执法响应速度显著提升。
商标确权标准收紧：法院裁定脱欧过渡期后纯英国在先权利无效；大上诉委员会拒绝“George Orwell”注册，认定名人姓名在特定类别具描述性；强调驰名商标全局评估。
新制度与工具红利：手工艺品/工业品地理标志（CIGI）进入国家向欧盟制度过渡期；DesignView成全球最大外观图像搜索引擎；SME基金继续支持中小企业降低申请成本。
actions: 排查英国权利风险：立即审查依赖英国未注册商标或早期权利的欧盟异议/无效案件，避免因脱欧过渡期结束导致权利基础丧失。
优化品牌注册策略：避免直接注册名人姓名或弱显著性词汇；利用DesignView进行外观侵权检索；积极申请EUIPO SME基金补贴以降低欧盟商标布局成本。
建立供应链合规溯源：针对药品、电子耗材等高敏品类，完善出口欧洲的防伪溯源体系，配合IPEP等执法工具，防范被卷入有组织犯罪相关的假冒指控。
watchlist: CIGI过渡截止日：密切关注2026年12月2日手工艺品地理标志国家制度向欧盟制度过渡的最终截止安排。
名人姓名审查口径：跟踪EUIPO对文学、艺术名人姓名在衍生商品上注册的最新判例，评估现有品牌资产的稳定性。
在线平台责任动态：观察欧盟委员会与EUIPO联合打击网售假冒的后续配套政策，特别是对电商平台审核义务的具体要求。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the EUIPO intensified cross-agency enforcement collaboration, launching the IPEP digital portal and partnering with the European Commission to combat online counterfeiting. Judicial developments clarified that UK unregistered rights cannot support EU oppositions post-Brexit transition, while standards for celebrity names and well-known marks were refined. Simultaneously, the new geographical indication regime for craft and industrial products entered its transitional phase, and DesignView expanded into the world’s largest design image search engine. Companies must adapt to stricter compliance requirements and leverage enhanced digital tools for rights protection. These shifts necessitate immediate reviews of brand portfolios, particularly regarding UK-based rights and high-risk supply chains, to ensure continued validity and effective enforcement in the evolvin...

Trademark validity standards tightened: Courts ruled that UK-only rights cannot block EU registrations post-transition; celebrity name applications face stricter descriptive assess...
New systems and tools: The craft and industrial geographical indications regime enters its transition period; DesignView becomes the global leading design search engine; SME funds...
actions_en: Audit UK right dependencies: Immediately review EU oppositions or invalidity actions relying on UK unregistered rights to prevent loss of legal basis following the Brexit transitio...
Optimize registration strategies: Avoid registering celebrity names or weakly distinctive terms; utilize DesignView for prior art searches; and apply for EUIPO SME funds to lower p...
Strengthen supply chain traceability: Implement robust anti-counterfeiting measures for sensitive sectors like pharmaceuticals and electronics, aligning with IPEP data sharing to m...
watchlist_en: CIGI transition deadline: Monitor the final arrangements for the transition from national to EU systems for craft and industrial geographical indications by December 2, 2026.
Celebrity name examination trends: Track recent case law regarding the registrability of literary and artistic figures' names on derivative goods to assess brand asset stability.
Online platform liability: Observe evolving joint policies between the European Commission and EUIPO concerning e-commerce due diligence obligations and anti-counterfeiting enforce...

topics.headline_zh: 欧英强化打假：跨境协同与资金加码
topics.headline_en: EU and UK Strengthen Cross-Border Anti-Counterfeit Enforcement and Funding
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟与英国显著升级假冒执法力度。EUIPO联合欧委会及Eurojust深化跨机构协作，聚焦药品与网络侵权；英国确认IP犯罪部门资金延至2029年并拟扩编，同时发布二手平台防伪指南。执法呈现刑事化、数字化及全渠道覆盖趋势，中企需警惕供应链合规风险及新兴渠道监控。
key_points: 欧盟深化跨机构协作：EUIPO联合欧委会、Eurojust打击网络盗版及有组织IP犯罪，SHIELD VI行动查获巨额假药。
英国执法资源固化：UKIPO获政府资助至2029年并计划扩编IP犯罪部门，强化长期打击能力。
监管延伸至新渠道：英国发布二手时尚平台防伪指南，欧盟重点关注在线侵权趋势，执法覆盖面扩大。
actions: 建立出口产品全流程溯源体系，完善供应链尽职调查，防范被卷入假冒或有组织犯罪指控。
将Vinted等二手交易平台及独立站纳入品牌日常监测范围，针对在线侵权提前布局取证与投诉机制。
密切关注英国IP犯罪部门扩编动态及欧盟EMPACT框架优先事项，调整欧洲市场合规与维权策略。
watchlist: 英国IP犯罪部门扩编的具体时间表、职能范围变化及2029年前案件查处数据。
欧盟层面针对网络假冒和盗版后续出台的配套执法安排或更明确的司法口径。
EMPACT框架下知识产权犯罪执法的跨机构协作动态及年度优先打击目标调整。
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European Union and the United Kingdom significantly intensified enforcement against intellectual property infringement. The European Union Intellectual Property Office deepened inter-agency collaboration with the European Commission and Eurojust, targeting online piracy and organized crime, notably through Operation SHIELD VI which seized substantial volumes of counterfeit medicines. Concurrently, the United Kingdom secured government funding for its Intellectual Property Crime Unit until 2029, with plans to expand operational capacity. Regulatory scrutiny has also extended to emerging channels, evidenced by new UK guidance on counterfeit goods in second-hand fashion markets. Regulatory scope expands to new channels: Authorities issue specific guidance for second-hand fashion platforms and prioritize online infringement trends, broadening the enforcemen...

Monitor developments regarding the UK IP Crime Unit’s expansion and EU EMPACT framework priorities to align European compliance and enforcement strategies with evolving institution...
watchlist_en: Specific timelines and functional scope changes for the UK IP Crime Unit expansion, along with enforcement metrics leading up to 2029.
Subsequent regulatory instruments or judicial interpretations issued by EU institutions addressing online counterfeiting and digital piracy enforcement standards.
Inter-agency collaboration dynamics under the EMPACT framework, particularly adjustments to annual priority targets for intellectual property crime enforcement.
